content:
✅ Approved the contribution.
Comment: I don't know why, but this Brian in the kitchen makes me laugh out loud. For that alone, you definitely deserve a positive vote! :D

That made me laugh! Good one! :D
Maybe you could add to the constraints: 
“Name and Place consist of a single word without spaces.”
And maybe another pair of tests for edge cases, something like: 
‘Is AI in the PC?’
'Is X in the Y?'

- Added "Where name and place are composed of uppercase and lowercase letters from A to Z only." in the description.
- Added the "Uppercase, even" pair of cases.

Thanks for the feedback :)
